Name: Label
Description: A display label for the scheme.

Name: Description
Description: A description of the content and purpose of the scheme.

Name: UnitTypeSchemeReference
Description: Inclusion of an existing UnitTypeScheme by reference.

Name: UnitTypeReference
Description: In-line description of a UnitType. These are used by reference at various points in the lifecycle.

Name: UnitTypeGroupReference
Description: In-line description of a group of UnitTypes.
